name: normalizeTeacherFilterId
intent: Teacher: validate a picking-filter id against the allowed set, returning null if invalid.

name: loadTeacherPickFilterId
intent: Teacher: read the persisted picking-filter id from sessionStorage.

name: saveTeacherPickFilterId
intent: Teacher: persist (or clear) the picking-filter id in sessionStorage.

name: setTeacherPickFiltersEnabled
intent: Teacher: enable/disable the hidden filter radio inputs (gated on a student being selected).

name: syncTeacherPickFiltersUI
intent: Teacher: reflect the current filter id into the hidden filter radio checked-states.

name: initTeacherPickFiltersUI
intent: Teacher: one-time wiring of the picking-filter radios + restore persisted filter on boot.

name: getActiveTeacherFilterId
intent: Teacher: resolve the effective filter id for a given/selected student (null if none).

name: isStudentLikeHome
intent: Branch helper: true on student home, or teacher home with a student selected (stats UI).

name: safeJsonParse
intent: Util: JSON.parse wrapper returning null on error.

name: fmtName
intent: Util: trim a name-like value to a clean string.

name: emailLocalPart
intent: Util: extract the local part of an email address.

name: studentLabel
intent: Teacher: build a human display label for a student (name, else email local part, else id).

name: setTeacherStudentStatus
intent: Teacher: write a status message into the student-select status element.

name: readTeacherSelectedStudentId
intent: Teacher: read the last-selected student id from sessionStorage, honoring a TTL.

name: writeTeacherSelectedStudentId
intent: Teacher: persist the selected student id (with timestamp) for hw_create autofill.

name: wireTeacherStudentSelect
intent: Teacher: attach a once-only change handler to the hidden student <select> driving the student view.

name: setTeacherStudentViewUI
intent: Teacher: set the active viewed-student id, toggle body class, enable filters, notify context change.

name: loadTeacherStudentStats
intent: Teacher: fetch the selected student's picking-screen stats (v2 init) and apply them.

name: applyTeacherStudentView
intent: Teacher: switch into 'as the student' mode — re-render accordion and load that student's stats.

name: refreshTeacherStudentSelect
intent: Teacher: load/refresh the student dropdown via listMyStudents (throttle, dedup, timeouts).

name: getAppBuildTag
intent: Util: read the app-build meta tag (used for cache-key versioning).

name: homeLast10CacheKey
intent: Student: build the localStorage/sessionStorage cache key for last-10 dashboard data.

name: setHomeStatsLoading
intent: Student-like: toggle the home-stats-loading skeleton body class (no-op unless student-like home).

name: readCache
intent: Util: read+parse a JSON object from a Storage by key, null on failure.

name: writeCache
intent: Util: write a JSON-serialized object into a Storage by key.

name: loadHomeLast10Cache
intent: Student: read cached last-10 dashboard from session/local/legacy storage respecting TTLs.

name: saveHomeLast10Cache
intent: Student: persist last-10 dashboard to session+local (+legacy) caches with timestamp.

name: pct
intent: Util: percentage (correct/total*100) rounded, null if total is 0.

name: badgeClassByPct
intent: Util: map a percentage to a badge color class (gray/red/yellow/lime/green).

name: fmtPct
intent: Util: format a percentage as 'N%' or em-dash for null.

name: fmtCnt
intent: Util: format a correct/total counter as 'c/t' (or '0/0').

name: fmtDateTimeRu
intent: Util: format an ISO date as ru-RU date+time string.

name: fmtDateShortRu
intent: Util: format an ISO date as a short ru-RU date string.

name: badgeClassByLastAttemptAt
intent: Util: map last-attempt recency (days) to a freshness badge color class.

name: getTeacherModalStatsCache
intent: Teacher: get (optionally create) the per-student in-memory question-stats cache map.

name: rememberTeacherModalStats
intent: Teacher: merge a fetched question->stats map into the per-student modal cache.

name: createEmptyTeacherModalStat
intent: Teacher: build a zeroed question-stat record placeholder.

name: normalizeTeacherModalStatsMap
intent: Teacher: normalize a stats map to a complete map keyed by the requested question ids.

name: collectManifestQuestionIds
intent: Util: collect all unique prototype question ids from a topic manifest.

name: listVisibleTeacherTopicsForPreload
intent: Teacher: list catalog topics with a manifest path, for stats warmup preloading.

name: warmTeacherModalStatsForStudent
intent: Teacher: background-preload per-topic question stats for the selected student (concurrent workers).

name: loadTeacherStatsForModal
intent: Teacher: get question stats for modal badges, using cache and fetching only missing ids.

name: buildModalBadgeEl
intent: Teacher: create a percentage stats badge DOM element for modals.

name: buildModalDateBadgeEl
intent: Teacher: create a (hidden) last-attempt-date badge DOM element for modals.

name: buildModalBadgeGroup
intent: Teacher: create a wrapper containing a date badge + a stats badge for modal cards.

name: setModalStatsBadge
intent: Teacher: render a question/group stat into a modal stats badge (color, %, count, tooltip).

name: setModalDateBadge
intent: Teacher: render the last-attempt date into a modal date badge (hidden when no attempts).

name: aggregateStatsForQuestionIds
intent: Util: sum totals/correct/last3 and pick latest last_attempt across a set of question ids.

name: getTeacherModalCachedAggregate
intent: Teacher: return an aggregated stat for question ids only if all are present in cache, else null.

name: ensureBaseTitle
intent: Util: capture and cache an element's original text as data-baseTitle for later restoration.

name: resetTitle
intent: Util: restore a title element's base text and strip recommendation/stat-chip classes.

name: setHomeBadge
intent: Student-like: render a percentage badge on a home accordion node (class, %, count, tooltip).

name: setHomeTopicBadge
intent: Student: render a topic's last-3 stats into its home badge.

name: setHomeSectionBadge
intent: Student-like: render a section-level percentage into its home badge.

name: setHomeCoverageBadge
intent: Student-like: render topic-coverage (used/total) into a section's coverage badge.

name: secondaryFromPrimary
intent: Util: map a rounded primary score (0-12) to the secondary EGE score via fixed table.

name: fmtPrimaryExact
intent: Util: format an exact primary score to 2 decimals with comma separator.

name: _syncHtThermoHeight
intent: Teacher (desktop): set --ht-thermo-h CSS var from badges-head row height, via ResizeObserver.

name: thermoColorByPrimary
intent: Util: map a rounded primary score to thermometer color class.

name: updateScoreThermo
intent: Student-like: render the readiness 'thermometer' fill/labels on the combo input (student-like only).

name: updateScoreForecast
intent: Student-like: compute primary/secondary forecast from per-section %, render forecast panel + thermo.

name: clearStudentLast10UI
intent: Student-like: reset all home badges/titles/forecast/recs to empty 'no data' state.

name: supabaseRefFromUrl
intent: Util: extract the supabase project ref subdomain from a URL.

name: readSessionFallback
intent: Student: read a fallback Supabase session directly from localStorage auth-token.

name: sessionTtlSec
intent: Util: compute remaining TTL (seconds) of a session from expires_at, NaN if unknown.

name: isFallbackSessionUsable
intent: Student: decide whether a fallback session has a token and enough TTL to use.

name: refreshStudentLast10
intent: Student: load the last-10 dashboard (cache-first, fallback session, boot retries) and apply.

name: invalidateStudentLast10Cache
intent: Student: drop cached last-10 dashboard entries for a uid (session+local).

name: scheduleStudentLast10Refresh
intent: Student: debounce a last-10 refresh trigger.

name: initStudentLast10LiveRefresh
intent: Student: wire visibility/pageshow/auth-state listeners to live-refresh the last-10 dashboard.

name: applyDashboardHomeStats
intent: Student: render student dashboard (topics last-3, section aggregates, forecast) into the accordion.

name: recommendationPriority
intent: Teacher: numeric priority ordering of recommendation reasons (weak < low < stale < uncovered).

name: recommendationTitleClass
intent: Teacher: map a recommendation reason to a title stat-chip color class.

name: inferRecommendationReasonFromState
intent: Teacher: derive a recommendation reason from a topic's performance/freshness/coverage state.

name: mergeRecommendationMeta
intent: Teacher: keep the higher-priority of two recommendation metas for a topic.

name: applyTitleRecommendation
intent: Teacher: apply a recommendation highlight class + tooltip to a section/topic title element.

name: buildTeacherPickingHomeModel
intent: Teacher: transform picking-screen v2 payload into a render model (%, coverage, recs, tooltips).

name: renderTeacherHomeRecs
intent: Teacher: render the top-3 'recommended today' cards and toggle the rec start button.

name: applyTeacherPickingHomeStats
intent: Teacher: apply the picking-screen model to accordion badges/titles, forecast, recs panel.

name: cleanRedirectUrl
intent: Auth: strip OAuth code/state/error params from the current URL.

name: firstNameFromUser
intent: Auth: derive a display first name from a Supabase user (metadata, then email, fallback 'Аккаунт').

name: fetchProfileFirstName
intent: Auth: fetch+cache the profile.first_name for a user id.

name: fetchProfileRole
intent: Auth: fetch+cache the profile.role for a user id (student/teacher).

name: refreshAuthHeaderUI
intent: Auth (legacy header): toggle login/user button, set name, adjust Stats vs My-students by role.

name: initAuthHeader
intent: Auth (legacy header): wire login/menu/logout for pages without the unified appHeader; else no-op.

name: getLastSelection
intent: Util: read the previously saved task selection from sessionStorage (memoized).

name: initModeToggle
intent: Non-student home: wire the list/test mode toggle (restoring previous mode).

name: initPickModeToggle
intent: Student: wire the manual/smart pick-mode toggle (student page only).

name: syncPickModeUI
intent: Student: reflect pick mode into toggle buttons and show/hide smart controls, bulk, accordion.

name: initSmartControls
intent: Student: wire the smart-training N-count buttons and 'build plan' button.

name: setSmartN
intent: Student: set the smart-training target task count and reflect active N button.

name: updateSmartHint
intent: Student: update the smart-training hint text based on login/stats/selection state.

name: getTotalSelected
intent: Util: total selected count across topics + sections + protos choice maps.

name: tryBuildSmartSelection
intent: Student: build a smart practice plan from 30-day stats (weakest/unseen topics) and apply it.

name: initShuffleToggle
intent: Both: wire the 'shuffle tasks' checkbox (restoring previous state).

name: anyPositive
intent: Util: true if any value in a count map is > 0.

name: readSelectionFromDOM
intent: Util: read topic/section counts directly from the accordion DOM inputs (robust on back-nav).

name: inferTopicIdFromQuestionId
intent: Util: derive a topic id (first two dotted segments) from a question id.

name: normalizeTeacherPickedRef
intent: Teacher: normalize an added-task row to a {topic_id, question_id} ref.

name: collectTeacherPickedRefs
intent: Teacher: collect deduped {topic_id, question_id} refs from all added-task buckets.

name: buildHwCreatePrefill
intent: Both: build the hw_create prefill payload (counts, shuffle, teacher student/filter/picked-refs).

name: initCreateHomeworkButton
intent: Teacher: wire 'Create homework' button — flush added tasks, save prefill, navigate to hw_create.

name: initBulkControls
intent: Both: wire the 'select all' / 'reset all' bulk accordion buttons.

name: bulkPickAll
intent: Both: add delta tasks to every section's count (bulk select).

name: bulkResetAll
intent: Both: clear all topic/section/proto selections (teacher: also rotate pick session seed).

name: refreshCountsUI
intent: Both: write choice maps back into accordion inputs and refresh totals (teacher: sync added tasks).

name: loadCatalog
intent: Both: load the runtime catalog and index sections/topics into SECTIONS and id maps.

name: syncHomeTopicBadgesWidth
intent: Student-like: measure widest topic badge and set a CSS var so all align (student-like only).

name: renderAccordion
intent: Both: rebuild the section/topic accordion DOM (student-like adds badges head + thermo sync).

name: renderSectionBadgesHead
intent: Student-like: build the 'Процент / Покрытие' badge column header row.

name: renderSectionNode
intent: Both: build a section accordion node (counter, optional badges, title, unique button, children).

name: renderTopicRow
intent: Both: build a topic accordion row (counter, optional badge, title; student-like opens proto modal).

name: setTopicCount
intent: Both: set a topic's chosen count, bubble totals (teacher: schedule added-tasks sync).

name: setSectionCount
intent: Both: set a section's chosen count, bubble totals (teacher: schedule added-tasks sync).

name: setProtoCount
intent: Both: set a prototype's chosen count (capped) in CHOICE_PROTOS, refresh totals (teacher: sync).

name: bubbleUpSums
intent: Both: sync section input values from CHOICE_SECTIONS and refresh the grand total.

name: refreshTotalSum
intent: Both: compute total selected, update sum element and start/added-tasks button enabled/ready states.

name: getProtoModalEls
intent: Student-like: resolve the prototype-picker modal DOM elements.

name: protoModalSum
intent: Student-like: sum chosen counts across the currently shown modal prototype types.

name: updateProtoModalSelectedCount
intent: Student-like: update the 'Выбрано: N' counter in the prototype modal.

name: closeProtoPickerModal
intent: Student-like: close and reset the prototype-picker modal.

name: refreshProtoModalBadges
intent: Teacher: fetch+render per-type student stat/date badges in the prototype modal.

name: openProtoPickerModal
intent: Student-like: open the prototype modal for a topic — load manifest, render type cards, badges.

name: renderProtoModalCard
intent: Student-like: build one prototype-type card (stem preview, +/- counter, teacher stat badges).

name: initProtoPickerModal
intent: Student-like: one-time wiring of prototype-modal close/backdrop/Escape handlers.

name: ensurePickerManifest
intent: Util: fetch+memoize a topic's manifest JSON from topic.path.

name: buildStemPreview
intent: Util: build an HTML stem preview (interpolated template + optional figure img) for a prototype.

name: asset
intent: Util: resolve an asset path to an absolute URL (passthrough for http/data).

name: interpolate
intent: Util: substitute ${param} placeholders in a stem template string.

name: escapeHtml
intent: Util: HTML-escape a string (full entity set).

name: typesetMathIfNeeded
intent: Util: run MathJax typesetting over a DOM root, loading MathJax first if needed.

name: ensureMathJaxLoaded
intent: Util: lazily inject the MathJax script and resolve when ready.

name: createTeacherPickSeed
intent: Teacher: generate a random session seed for deterministic teacher picking.

name: getAddedTasksModalEls
intent: Teacher: resolve the added-tasks preview modal DOM elements.

name: getTeacherAddedTasksContextKey
intent: Teacher: build the context key (student id + filter id) keying the added-tasks store.

name: loadTeacherAddedTasksStore
intent: Teacher: read the persisted added-tasks store (per-context buckets) from sessionStorage.

name: saveTeacherAddedTasksStore
intent: Teacher: persist the added-tasks store to sessionStorage.

name: persistAddedTasksContext
intent: Teacher: save the current in-memory added-tasks context (seed+buckets) into the store.

name: ensureAddedTasksContextLoaded
intent: Teacher: load/switch the added-tasks context for the current student+filter, rebuilding id counts.

name: getCurrentTeacherPickSessionSeed
intent: Teacher: get the current added-tasks context seed for a student (empty if none).

name: setCurrentTeacherPickSessionSeed
intent: Teacher: set the current context seed (defaulting to a new seed) and persist.

name: rotateCurrentTeacherPickSessionSeed
intent: Teacher: replace the current context seed with a fresh random one.

name: onTeacherContextChanged
intent: Teacher: on student/filter change reload context, force-sync added tasks, refresh proto badges.

name: scheduleSyncAddedTasks
intent: Teacher: debounce (or immediate) a sync of added-task buckets to the current selection.

name: flushTeacherAddedTasksSelection
intent: Teacher: cancel pending debounce and synchronously sync added tasks (before navigation/save).

name: incIdCount
intent: Teacher: increment the in-context usage count for a question id (dedup/exclude tracking).

name: decIdCount
intent: Teacher: decrement (and drop at zero) the in-context usage count for a question id.

name: getExcludeSet
intent: Teacher: build the set of already-added question ids to exclude from new picks.

name: getDesiredCountsFromSelection
intent: Teacher: convert CHOICE_* maps into desired per-bucket counts (proto/topic/section) and total.

name: flattenAddedQuestions
intent: Teacher: flatten all added-task buckets into a single questions array.

name: sortAddedQuestions
intent: Teacher: sort added questions by section, then topic, then question id.

name: buildTeacherResolveSelection
intent: Teacher: build the RPC selection payload (protos/topics/sections + excluded topics).

name: pickQuestionsViaTeacherScreenResolve
intent: Teacher: resolve concrete questions for one scope via teacher_picking_screen_v2 (resolve mode).

name: pickQuestionsViaTeacherScreenResolveBatch
intent: Teacher: resolve concrete questions for many scopes in one teacher_picking_resolve_batch_v1 call.

name: pickDeltaForBucket
intent: Teacher: pick N more questions for a bucket — via RPC when a student is selected, else local engine.

name: appendPickedQuestionsToBucket
intent: Teacher: append picked questions to a bucket and bump id counts; returns how many added.

name: syncAddedTasksToSelection
intent: Teacher: reconcile added-task buckets with the selection (trim, top up protos/topics/sections).

name: openAddedTasksModal
intent: Teacher: open added-tasks modal — sync selection then render the preview (full path).

name: closeAddedTasksModal
intent: Teacher: close the added-tasks preview modal.

name: openAddedTasksModalFast
intent: Teacher: open added-tasks modal reusing the rendered view when unchanged, else flush+render.

name: initAddedTasksModal
intent: Teacher: one-time wiring of the added-tasks button/close/backdrop/Escape + initial context load.

name: loadTopicPoolForPreview
intent: Util: load+memoize a topic's full prototype pool from its manifest(s) (topic.path/paths).

name: buildQuestionForPreview
intent: Util: build a preview question (ids, titles, stem, figure, badge ids) from manifest/type/proto.

name: normalizeResolveReqArray
intent: Util: normalize a choice map/array into [{id,n}] entries with positive n.

name: buildResolveBucketKey
intent: Util: build a canonical 'proto:/topic:/section:' bucket key from a scope kind+id.

name: getResolveRowBucketKey
intent: Util: derive the bucket key for a resolved RPC row (handles global_all and id aliases).

name: getTeacherResolveManifestIndex
intent: Teacher: fetch+cache a manifest and build a question-id -> {manifest,type,proto} index.

name: buildPreviewQuestionsFromResolveRows
intent: Teacher: turn resolved RPC rows into preview questions per bucket, dedup up to wanted counts.

name: getAddedTasksRenderSignature
intent: Teacher: compute a signature of the added-tasks list (context+total+ordered ids) for reuse.

name: hydrateAddedTasksModalBadgesFromCache
intent: Teacher: fill added-task card badges from cached aggregates without a network call.

name: refreshAddedTasksModalBadges
intent: Teacher: fetch and render per-card student stat/date badges in the added-tasks modal.

name: refreshAddedTasksModalView
intent: Teacher: render the added-tasks preview, typeset math, then refresh badges.

name: renderAddedTasksPreview
intent: Teacher: render added-task cards (numbering, badges, section/topic meta, stem, figure) + meta.

name: saveSelectionAndGo
intent: Both: finalize selection, build frozen questions, create a session link, navigate to trainer/list.

name: esc
intent: Util: HTML-escape a string (ampersand/lt/gt/quote).

name: compareId
intent: Util: numeric dotted-id comparator (e.g. '1.2' < '1.10') for sorting.
